name: Auto Assign Lead to Manager
script:
# Only run this logic if the Lead has just been moved to the "Qualified" state
if doc.workflow_state == "Qualified":
    
    # Check if a manager is already assigned. If so, don't overwrite it.
    manager_assigned = frappe.db.exists("ToDo", {
        "reference_type": "Lead",
        "reference_name": doc.name,
        "status": "Open",
        "role": "SRB Sales Manager" # We check against the role, not a specific person
    })

    if not manager_assigned:
        # 1. Find the primary Sales Manager in the system (or a specific one if you prefer)
        # For this example, we'll just grab the first active user with the Sales Manager role.
        manager_email = frappe.db.get_value("Has Role", 
            {"role": "SRB Sales Manager", "parenttype": "User"}, 
            "parent"
        )
        
        if manager_email:
            # 2. Use Frappe's built-in assignment tool to officially assign the document
            # This automatically sends an email/notification and adds it to their ToDo list.
            from frappe.desk.form.assign_to import add as assign_to
            
            assign_to({
                "assign_to": [manager_email],
                "doctype": "Lead",
                "name": doc.name,
                "description": f"New Qualified Lead awaiting Site Engineer assignment: {doc.lead_name}"
            })
            
            # Note: We don't need to save the 'doc' here because this is a 'Before Save' event.
            # Frappe will handle the final save automatically.
